description_long: This is a modern, multi-story brick house with a flat roof and a spacious, landscaped yard. The front features a paved walkway leading to a glass-paneled main entrance, flanked by greenery and a small wooden fence. The property includes a backyard with a freeform swimming pool, surrounded by a wooden deck and lush trees, including a prominent purple-flowering tree. The house has large, rectangular windows arranged in a clean, linear pattern, and a rooftop terrace with a railing. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes geometric forms, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, multi-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and trees. The design is geometric and open, with a rooftop terrace and a glass-paneled entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, glass doors, landscaped yard, pool, and prominent trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, garage structure, and partial view of the pool and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, solid brick facade, and the purple-flowering tree visible in the yard.
description_view_3: Backyard view focusing on the pool, wooden deck, trees, and the rear elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and a rooftop row
attribute_entryway_design: Glass-paneled main door with a paved approach, flanked by greenery and a small wooden fence, no porch or overhang
